## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-11-11ed2696`

finding_summary: `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:546-565` and `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:951-968` assume every dependency target exists. `next_ready_issue()` treats a missing `blocks` dependency as satisfied via `is_none_or(...)`, so `bv --robot-next` can advance downstream work when a prerequisite row has been dropped from `.beads/issues.jsonl`. On the `br show` path, the same dangling dependency trips `expect("dependency issue must exist")` and panics the test process instead of returning a deterministic mock failure. Because this fixture intentionally reloads on-disk graph rewrites, a slightly inconsistent rewrite can now either unblock the wrong bead or crash the mock adapter.
affected_files:
- src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs
remediation_hint: Require every dependency lookup to succeed before a bead is considered ready, and replace the `expect(...)` in `br_show_json()` with error propagation or a mock exit failure so dangling dependencies are handled deterministically.
